item.title: AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 28min "He was absolutely done by the start at Cheltenham and did really well to finish second
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 28min "He was absolutely done by the start at Cheltenham and did really well to finish second."
Find out who caught @HawkWing2002 's eye in the National Hunt Chase last time...
#WeekendWinners | @BetVictor 1 2 2 mil

item.title:
AKBets: AK BETS @AKBets · 31min AK BETS @ PUNCHESTOWN
11 days before the Festival Irish track Bookmakers have been informed t
item.description:
AK BETS @AKBets · 31min AK BETS @ PUNCHESTOWN
11 days before the Festival Irish track Bookmakers have been informed there will be no Premium areas outside of the ring this year.
An incredibly disappointing decision to a loyal bunch of sole traders who have sponsored numerous free entry gates. 6 11 2 mil
